items.title: Nineteen jailed over deadly Moscow concert attack
items.dek: Gunmen opened fire at Crocus City Concert hall near Moscow in 2024, killing 149 and injuring more than 500.
items.body: Gunmen opened fire at Crocus City Concert hall near Moscow in 2024, killing 149 and injuring more than 500.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Jo Malone sued for using her own name in collaboration with Zara
items.dek: The perfumier sold the rights to her name in 1999 but has previously said she regretted the move.
items.body: The perfumier sold the rights to her name in 1999 but has previously said she regretted the move.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: How Iran war laid bare the world's reliance on Gulf oil and gas
items.dek: Countries around the world are feeling the impact of the conflict and the resulting energy price shock.
items.body: Countries around the world are feeling the impact of the conflict and the resulting energy price shock.
